LanguageData.FB_AcceptanceOfFleshColony.description: This pawn’s mind is bound to the psychic patterns of the Flesh Colony. Human attachments and fears lose their edge—the strange horrors around them no longer catch, and reality feels distant and muffled, as if thought is being guided by an alien rhythm. Across the skin, tendrils emerge: not adornment and not wounds, but living conduits of connection, holding the pawn within the shared network. The colony's influence slowly reinforces damaged tissue, aiding wound healing, immunity, and the fading of old scars.
LanguageData.FB_AcceptanceOfFleshColony.label: flesh-colony acceptance
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastHealingComa.description: The colony flesh immobilizes this creature while sealing and tending its open wounds. The injuries remain and must heal naturally afterward.
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastHealingComa.label: fleshbeast healing torpor
LanguageData.FB_FleshbeastHealingComa.stages.0.label: regenerative torpor
LanguageData.FB_FleshInstability.description: This body is still stabilizing after violent division or fragmentation. Until the instability fades, the host cannot split again.
LanguageData.FB_FleshInstability.label: flesh instability
LanguageData.FB_FleshInstability.stages.0.label: residual instability
LanguageData.FB_FleshInstability.stages.1.label: stabilizing flesh
LanguageData.FB_FleshInstability.stages.2.label: acute instability
LanguageData.FB_FunSpores.label: fun spores
LanguageData.FB_FunSpores.stages.0.label: initial exposure
LanguageData.FB_FunSpores.stages.1.label: light infection
LanguageData.FB_FunSpores.stages.2.label: moderate infection
LanguageData.FB_FunSpores.stages.3.label: severe infection
LanguageData.FB_GeneticFatigue.description: This condition occurs after a gene extraction attempt, causing stress and instability at the genetic level. It leads to increased pain, reduced consciousness, and impaired blood filtration, slowing down recovery processes.
LanguageData.FB_GeneticFatigue.label: genetic fatigue
LanguageData.FB_GraftmawSurgicalStasis.description: The target is pinned in place by living surgical tendrils and cannot resist the current procedure.
LanguageData.FB_GraftmawSurgicalStasis.label: graftmaw surgical stasis
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponBondOwner.description: This colonist is psychically linked to one or more living weapons.
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponBondOwner.label: living weapon bond
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponBondWeapon.description: This living weapon recognizes a single bonded wielder.
LanguageData.FB_LivingWeaponBondWeapon.label: bonded wielder
LanguageData.FB_NerveclotResonance.description: This creature is wrapped in nerveclot resonance. Its pain response dulls, its flesh knits faster, and its muscles move with frantic speed.
LanguageData.FB_NerveclotResonance.label: nerveclot resonance
LanguageData.FB_NeuralStatic.description: Neural chatter from a nearby nerveclot scrambles focus and sleep rhythms, leaving the mind tense and trigger-happy.
LanguageData.FB_NeuralStatic.label: neural static
LanguageData.FB_OrganicArmor_Head.description: The skull of this creature has been reinforced with dense bone plates, creating natural protection for its head.
LanguageData.FB_OrganicArmor_Head.label: head organic armor
LanguageData.FB_OrganicArmor_Head.stages.0.label: friable-stage
LanguageData.FB_OrganicArmor_Head.stages.1.label: decay-stage
LanguageData.FB_OrganicArmor_Head.stages.2.label: strong-stage
LanguageData.FB_OrganicArmor_Torso.description: A number of large bones have grown on this creature, forming a natural armor that protects its torso.
LanguageData.FB_OrganicArmor_Torso.label: torso organic armor
LanguageData.FB_OrganicArmor_Torso.stages.0.label: friable-stage
LanguageData.FB_OrganicArmor_Torso.stages.1.label: decay-stage
LanguageData.FB_OrganicArmor_Torso.stages.2.label: strong-stage
LanguageData.FB_OrganicMass.comps.0.transformationNot: Your pawn has transformed into a flesh monster.
LanguageData.FB_OrganicMass.description: This living tissue is used by the dense weaver to heal and replace lost limbs of allied pawns. Over time, the organic mass will continue to grow and spread throughout the host's body, potentially replacing more and more of their original tissues.
LanguageData.FB_OrganicMass.label: Organic mass
LanguageData.FB_Parasite.label: parasite
LanguageData.FB_Parasite.stages.0.label: early-stage
LanguageData.FB_Parasite.stages.1.label: middle-stage
LanguageData.FB_Parasite.stages.2.label: late-stage
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite.description: The host's brain, was filled with the consciousness of the parasite. If the body dies, the parasite disconnects from the body, transferring the consciousness to the next host.
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite.label: personality parasite
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite.stages.0.label: Parasitic Infusion
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite.stages.1.label: Energy Drain
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite.stages.2.label: Vitality Siphon
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite.stages.3.label: Advanced Depletion
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite.stages.4.label: Terminal Exsanguination
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityParasite.stages.5.label: Death
LanguageData.FB_PoisonousSpores.label: poisonous spores
LanguageData.FB_PoisonousSpores.stages.0.label: initial exposure
LanguageData.FB_PoisonousSpores.stages.1.label: light infection
LanguageData.FB_PoisonousSpores.stages.2.label: moderate infection
LanguageData.FB_PoisonousSpores.stages.3.label: severe infection
LanguageData.FB_ResurrectionShock.description: This person's body and mind have undergone severe stress due to resurrection. They are experiencing temporary weakness and instability.
LanguageData.FB_ResurrectionShock.label: resurrection shock
LanguageData.FB_SinewcallerBeckoned.description: A probing psychic lure tugs this animal through its hindbrain, overriding instinct and forcing it to shadow the hunter that called it.
LanguageData.FB_SinewcallerBeckoned.label: beckoned by flesh
LanguageData.FB_SporeAnesthesia.description: Spore-induced anesthesia renders creatures unconscious and affects their bodily functions.
LanguageData.FB_SporeAnesthesia.label: spore anesthesia
LanguageData.FB_SporeAnesthesia.stages.0.label: initial exposure
LanguageData.FB_SporeAnesthesia.stages.1.label: drowsy
LanguageData.FB_SporeAnesthesia.stages.2.label: unconscious
LanguageData.FB_SporeGrowths.description: Carriers of this gene develop spore-emitting growths on their bodies. These growths can release various types of spores that have different effects on the environment and other creatures.
LanguageData.FB_SporeGrowths.label: spore growths
LanguageData.FB_ThrallbloomNeuralLink.description: This creature is under the control of an external mind through a neural-organic link. It follows commands without resistance, but if the connection is broken, it may become hostile or unstable.
LanguageData.FB_ThrallbloomNeuralLink.label: neural thrall link
LanguageData.FB_PoisonousSpores.description: Toxic flesh-spores are spreading through the body, weakening movement and coordination as the infection deepens.
LanguageData.FB_FunSpores.description: Euphoric spores from living flesh are altering the pawn's mood and perception, dulling concern and replacing fear with unnatural pleasure.
LanguageData.FB_Parasite.description: A flesh parasite is developing inside the host. As it matures, the host may vomit up new fleshbeasts while their body is used as living incubator tissue.
LanguageData.FB_TriTendrilsGrowth.description: Three muscular tendrils have grown from this pawn's torso. They are part weapon, part organ, lashing out with blunt force when the host fights.
LanguageData.FB_TriTendrilsGrowth.label: tri-tendrils
LanguageData.FB_DorsalSpinesGrowth.description: Two spine-tendrils protrude from this pawn's back. Each one can jab forward in close combat.
LanguageData.FB_DorsalSpinesGrowth.label: dorsal spike pair
LanguageData.FB_MeatBloomGrowth.description: This pawn is constantly growing loose edible flesh. The new tissue pulls extra nutrition from the body until it sloughs away.
LanguageData.FB_MeatBloomGrowth.label: meat bloom
LanguageData.FB_BloodTendrilChanneling.description: This pawn is rooted in place while a blood tendril pumps stolen blood back into the body.
LanguageData.FB_BloodTendrilOrgan.description: A specialized organic tendril embedded in the throat. This flexible, muscular organ can extend outward through the mouth, latch onto a distant target, and extract blood.
LanguageData.FB_BloodTendrilLatched.description: A blood tendril is hooked into this body, pinning it in place while it drains blood.
LanguageData.FB_BloodTendrilChanneling.label: blood tendril channeling
LanguageData.FB_BloodTendrilLatched.label: blood tendril latch
LanguageData.FB_BloodTendrilOrgan.label: blood tendril
LanguageData.FB_NeuralOverheat.label: neural overheat
LanguageData.FB_NeuralOverheat.description: Residual neural heat accumulated while a pawn is used for accelerated research. Reaching full severity burns the brain and resets the accumulated heat. Outside the synapse core, it gradually dissipates over one day.
LanguageData.FB_FerrimawMetalMetabolismPaused.label: dormant ferric gut
LanguageData.FB_FerrimawMetalMetabolismPaused.descrip: The ferrimaw's metal metabolism is dormant, suppressing hunger until it is allowed to consume stored metal again.
